Pump.fun sniper bot

A pump.fun Telegram bot built for fast launch decisions

SlimeWire helps you watch fresh pump.fun launches, open charts, scan risk, buy from Telegram, and manage exits without bouncing between five different bots.

Open @SlimeWiredBotOpen web terminal

What SlimeWire does for pump.fun traders

The goal is speed with context: fresh pairs are useless without safety reads, charts, position controls, and a clean exit plan.

Fresh launch watch

Track new pump.fun-style coins, filter by age and momentum, and jump straight to the token chart or trade panel.

Sniper entries

Pick wallet, amount, slippage, and optional TP/SL so the entry is ready when the setup appears.

SlimeShield read

Review liquidity, holder concentration, authority notes, market data, and visible risk warnings before sizing.

Protected buy

Use presets with stop-loss, take-profit, timer exits, and slippage controls for fast but intentional trades.

Group alerts

Use the Telegram bot in communities to post token cards, scan results, and quick trade links.

Web chart handoff

Open full SlimeWire charts and transactions when a mobile Telegram card is not enough.

How it works

1. Open the bot

Start @SlimeWiredBot and use a managed wallet or connect from the web terminal.

2. Scan the launch

Paste a CA, ticker, or open a fresh launch row to see chart, safety, liquidity, and flow context.

3. Enter and manage exits

Buy with a preset, then manage TP/SL, timer exits, positions, PnL, and sells from Telegram or web.

Why not use a one-purpose pump bot?

Single-purpose bots can be fast, but pump.fun trading needs more than a buy button. SlimeWire combines live discovery, safety, charts, wallets, protected entries, copy tools, volume tools, and launch tools in one place.

Less tab switching

Scan, chart, buy, sell, and review PnL without leaving the SlimeWire stack.

Better context

See token data, market flow, and risk factors before a fast entry becomes a blind entry.

Launch-side tools

Creators can pair trading with launch, community, volume, and raid tools.

FAQ

What is a pump.fun Telegram bot?

A pump.fun Telegram bot helps traders watch fresh pump.fun launches, inspect token safety, open charts, and buy or sell from Telegram without switching tools.

Can SlimeWire snipe pump.fun launches?

Yes. SlimeWire includes launch watch and sniper flows for fresh pump.fun coins, with wallet selection, amount presets, slippage, and optional take-profit or stop-loss settings.

Does SlimeWire check pump.fun token safety?

SlimeWire runs SlimeShield checks that look at visible market data, authority risks, holder concentration, liquidity, and risk notes before a protected or quick buy.

Can I use SlimeWire from the web too?

Yes. The Telegram bot and web terminal work together, so you can open a token in SlimeWire charts, inspect transactions, and manage positions on the site.

Is this only for pump.fun?

No. SlimeWire supports Solana trading tools beyond pump.fun, including copy trading, live pairs, volume tools, wallet balances, positions, PnL, and launch tools.

Try the pump.fun bot flow

Open Telegram, paste a token, and let SlimeWire show the chart, safety read, and trade controls.
